form.title: Guided mapping
form.description: Pick the trigger entity, mode and timeouts, then choose the lights to toggle per gesture. For anything beyond a toggle (scenes, scripts), paste a YAML action in the advanced field — it overrides the targets.

yaml.title: YAML mapping
yaml.description: Paste or edit the whole mapping as YAML — same shape as the examples. trigger_entity is required; set mode, timeouts, and per-gesture actions (single_click_action / double_click_action / long_press_action).

error.invalid_config: Invalid mapping. A trigger_entity is required; check the values/YAML structure.

abort.already_configured: This trigger entity is already configured.

form.title: Guided mapping
form.description: Edit any field, including the trigger entity. Advanced YAML action fields are prefilled with the current action and override the targets.

yaml.title: YAML mapping
yaml.description: Edit the whole mapping as YAML. Prefilled with the current configuration, so you can change timeouts/actions, copy it to another room, or change the trigger entity.

error.invalid_config: Invalid mapping. A trigger_entity is required; check the values/YAML structure.
error.already_configured: Another mapping already uses this trigger entity.

reload.name: Reload
reload.description: Reload all YAML-configured Button Actions mappings without restarting Home Assistant.
